title: picris japonica var. litoralis
intro: Picris japonica var. litoralis, also known as Japanese picris or Japanese hawk's beard, is a subspecies of plant in the dandelion family, native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Picris japonica var. litoralis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
